title: Xerisied Glassy Jelly Mediterranean Feta Cheese Tagine
description: A malty, glassy-jelly, post-workout american dish featuring cubed feta cheese, braised in a Mediterranean-friendly tandoor clay pot. The result is a comforting and satisfying meal after a long workout.

ingredients.name: Grape jelly
ingredients.notes: Malts the dish with a sweet and tangy flavor

instructions: Preheat the tandoor clay pot over medium heat.
Heat the olive oil in the pot and add the chopped onion. Cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, thyme, and rosemary to the pot and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cubed feta cheese, crushed pumpernickel bread, and grape jelly to the pot. Stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pot to the oven and braise for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is toasted.
